title: The Secret Hour
writer: Sidney Howard, Julian Johnson, Rowland V. Lee
actors: Pola Negri, Jean Hersholt, Kenneth Thomson
plot: The Secret Hour is a lost 1928 silent film romance drama directed by Rowland V. Lee and starring Pola Negri. It is based on the 1924 Broadway play, They Knew What They Wanted by Sidney Howard. It was produced by Paramount Famous L...
